mapper.select:
SELECT bill.id AS id, bill.type AS type, f.name AS frame, IF(bill.type IN ('sell','sre'), cu.name, su.name) AS unit, bill.time AS time, bill.number AS number, CASE WHEN bill.inv_status = 3 THEN '无需开具' WHEN IFNULL(inv.opened_amount,0) = 0 THEN '未开票' WHEN IFNULL(inv.opened_amount,0) < bill.total THEN '部分开票' ELSE '已开票' END AS status, bill.total AS totalCount, IFNULL(inv.opened_amount,0) AS invoicedCount, GREATEST(bill.total - IFNULL(inv.opened_amount,0), 0) AS disinvoicedCount, CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(16,2)) AS invoiceTotal FROM ( /* 统一成一张“单据基表” */ SELECT 'buy' AS type, b.id, b.frame, b.supplier AS unit_id, b.time, b.number, b.actual AS total, b.invoice AS inv_status FROM buy b UNION ALL SELECT 'bre' AS type, br.id, br.frame, br.supplier AS unit_id, br.time, br.number, br.actual AS total, br.invoice AS inv_status FROM bre br UNION ALL SELECT 'sell' AS type, s.id, s.frame, s.customer AS unit_id, s.time, s.number, s.actual AS total, s.invoice AS inv_status FROM sell s UNION ALL SELECT 'sre' AS type, sr.id, sr.frame, sr.customer AS unit_id, sr.time, sr.number, sr.actual AS total, sr.invoice AS inv_status FROM sre sr ) bill /* 发票金额汇总 */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT `type`, `class` AS bill_id, SUM(money) AS opened_amount FROM invoice GROUP BY `type`, `class` ) inv ON inv.`type` = bill.type AND inv.bill_id = bill.id /* 组织与往来单位名称 */ LEFT JOIN frame f ON f.id = bill.frame LEFT JOIN customer cu ON (bill.type IN ('sell','sre') AND cu.id = bill.unit_id) LEFT JOIN supplier su ON (bill.type IN ('buy','bre') AND su.id = bill.unit_id)
AND bill.number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.number}, '%')
AND bill.type IN
#{t}
AND bill.inv_status IN
#{s}
AND (bill.type IN ('buy','bre') AND su.id = #{q.supplier})
AND (bill.type IN ('sell','sre') AND cu.id = #{q.customer})
AND bill.time >= CONCAT(#{q.startDate}, ' 00:00:00')
AND bill.time <= CONCAT(#{q.endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
ORDER BY bill.time DESC, bill.number DESC

SELECT bill.id, bill.type, f.name AS frame, COALESCE(cu.name, su.name) AS unit, bill.time, bill.number, CASE WHEN bill.inv_status = 3 THEN '无需开具' WHEN IFNULL(inv.opened_amount, 0) = 0 THEN '未开票' WHEN IFNULL(inv.opened_amount, 0) < bill.total THEN '部分开票' ELSE '已开票' END AS status, bill.total AS totalCount, IFNULL(inv.opened_amount, 0) AS invoicedCount, GREATEST(bill.total - IFNULL(inv.opened_amount, 0), 0) AS disinvoicedCount, CAST(0.00 AS DECIMAL(16,2)) AS invoiceTotal FROM ( SELECT 'buy' AS type, b.id, b.frame, b.supplier AS unit_id, b.`time`, b.`number`, b.actual AS total, b.invoice AS inv_status FROM buy b UNION ALL SELECT 'bre' AS type, br.id, br.frame, br.supplier AS unit_id, br.`time`, br.`number`, br.actual AS total, br.invoice AS inv_status FROM bre br UNION ALL SELECT 'sell' AS type, s.id, s.frame, s.customer AS unit_id, s.`time`, s.`number`, s.actual AS total, s.invoice AS inv_status FROM sell s UNION ALL SELECT 'sre' AS type, sr.id, sr.frame, sr.customer AS unit_id, sr.`time`, sr.`number`, sr.actual AS total, sr.invoice AS inv_status FROM sre sr ) bill LEFT JOIN ( SELECT `type`, `class` AS bill_id, SUM(money) AS opened_amount FROM invoice GROUP BY `type`, `class` ) inv ON inv.`type` = bill.type AND inv.bill_id = bill.id LEFT JOIN frame f ON f.id = bill.frame LEFT JOIN customer cu ON (bill.type IN ('sell','sre') AND cu.id = bill.unit_id) LEFT JOIN supplier su ON (bill.type IN ('buy','bre') AND su.id = bill.unit_id) WHERE
(bill.type = #{k.type} AND bill.id = #{k.id})
1 = 0
ORDER BY bill.`time` DESC, bill.`number` DESC

SELECT inv.id AS id, inv.`type` AS `type`, f.`name` AS `frame`, COALESCE(cu.`name`, su.`name`) AS businessUnit, bill.`time` AS `time`, bill.`number` AS `number`, bill.`actual` AS `total`, inv.`time` AS invTime, inv.`number` AS invNumber, /* 单据口径的发票状态（与页面一致） */ CASE WHEN bill.inv_status = 3 THEN '无需开具' WHEN IFNULL(inv_sum.opened_amount, 0) = 0 THEN '未开票' WHEN IFNULL(inv_sum.opened_amount, 0) < bill.`actual` THEN '部分开票' ELSE '已开票' END AS `invoice`, inv.`title` AS `title`, inv.`money` AS invMoney, inv.`file` AS `file`, inv.`data` AS `data` FROM invoice inv /* 业务单据联合视图 */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT 'buy' AS `type`, b.`id`, b.`frame`, b.`supplier` AS unit_id, b.`time`, b.`number`, b.`actual`, b.`invoice` AS inv_status FROM buy b UNION ALL SELECT 'bre' AS `type`, br.`id`, br.`frame`, br.`supplier` AS unit_id, br.`time`, br.`number`, br.`actual`, br.`invoice` AS inv_status FROM bre br UNION ALL SELECT 'sell' AS `type`, s.`id`, s.`frame`, s.`customer` AS unit_id, s.`time`, s.`number`, s.`actual`, s.`invoice` AS inv_status FROM sell s UNION ALL SELECT 'sre' AS `type`, sr.`id`, sr.`frame`, sr.`customer` AS unit_id, sr.`time`, sr.`number`, sr.`actual`, sr.`invoice` AS inv_status FROM sre sr ) bill ON bill.`type` = inv.`type` AND bill.`id` = inv.`class` /* 同单据的已开票汇总 */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT `type`, `class`, SUM(`money`) AS opened_amount FROM invoice GROUP BY `type`, `class` ) inv_sum ON inv_sum.`type` = inv.`type` AND inv_sum.`class` = inv.`class` LEFT JOIN frame f ON f.`id` = bill.`frame` LEFT JOIN supplier su ON (inv.`type` IN ('buy','bre') AND su.`id` = bill.`unit_id`) LEFT JOIN customer cu ON (inv.`type` IN ('sell','sre') AND cu.`id` = bill.`unit_id`) WHERE 1 = 1
AND (inv.`type` IN ('buy','bre') AND bill.`unit_id` = #{q.supplier})
AND (inv.`type` IN ('sell','sre') AND bill.`unit_id` = #{q.customer})
AND bill.`number` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.number}, '%')
AND inv.`type` IN
#{t}
AND inv.`time` >= CONCAT(#{q.startDate}, ' 00:00:00')
AND inv.`time` <= CONCAT(#{q.endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
AND inv.`number` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.inr}, '%')
AND inv.`title` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.title}, '%')
ORDER BY inv.`time` DESC, inv.`number` DESC
